decision: MVP focuses on Pomodoro timer + task management + AI coach
rationale: Core value prop is focused work sessions, not feature breadth

decision: Rose #f43f5e brand color distinguishes FocusFlow within HumanOS
rationale: Each app has unique brand color per ecosystem design system

decision: Sessions API auto-increments task.focusSessions on completion
rationale: Track how many pomodoros each task required without extra queries
